title: Tab button state style not applying in live version
symptom: The custom background and text color for the current Tab button works in the test version but fails to apply in the live version.
applies_when: Using a state for the Tab button
not_this_if: State style applies correctly in the test version
root_cause: The issue arises from the prerendering process, which does not correctly apply the state styles in the live environment. This is a known bug that is being addressed by the development team.
fix_steps: Open the publish dialog in the WeWeb editor
Locate the option to disable pre-rendering
Disable pre-rendering and publish the changes
agent_instruction: Disable pre-rendering in the publish dialog to apply the Tab button state styles correctly.
